setting: the Ashen Throne, where the boundary between echo and reality dissolves
stakes: The truth of the crown is revealed, and the path to the coast opens

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: You stand where I once stood. You hold what I once held. Do you feel it now? The weight that bends the world?

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: The crown does not corrupt. It reveals. Every soul who wears it sees the truth: that power is isolation, that rule is sacrifice, that every choice births a thousand wounds.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: The Reforged know this. They rejected the crown not from fear, but from wisdom. They chose to build anew rather than rule what was broken.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: The corruption flees to the coast -- to the Heart of the Tide. It knows you follow. It knows the crown's power grows in your hands.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: Go now. The tide waits. And remember: the crown offers three ends. Destroy it, and free us all. Wear it, and become what I was. Or... offer it to those who would bear it willingly. Choose well. The world breaks either way.
